name: ILNodeSetOperationMode
title: ILNodeSetOperationMode
syntax: long ILNodeSetOperationMode(char aNodeName[], long mode, long param); // form 1
long ILNodeSetOperationMode(dbMsg message, char signalGroupName[], long mode, long param); //(2)
long ILNodeSetOperationMode(dbSignal signal, long mode, long param); // form 3
description: Form 1:Sets specific operation mode in the interaction layer of the specified simulation node. The specified node must be in the current bus context. In all other cases the function has no effect and will return with an error.
Form 2:Sets specific operation mode in the interaction layer for the specified signal group of the specified message.
Form 3:Sets specific operation mode in the interaction layer for the specified signal.

parameters.name: aNodeName
parameters.description: Name of the node of which the specific operation mode should be set. Supported qualification patterns for form 1: [DBName::]aNodeName

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message of which the specific operation mode should be set.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Name of the update bit signal of which the specific operation mode should be set.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: mode - 0: influences update bits; other values have currently no effect and are reserved.
0: all update bits will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: all update bits will always be sent with value = 1
0: the update bit of the signal group will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: the update bit of the signal group will always be sent with value = 1
0: the update bit will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: the update bit will always be sent with value = 1

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
